candidate_llm_application: Two-op (twist/cross) programmable merge calculus over pricking-coordinate graph; sprig-then-ground subskill composition

results.judge_justification: Pure source-domain craft article; no LLM application.
Pillow dressing guide; no LLM operation.
Math model of bobbin lace; not applied to LLM parameter merge.
Surveys TIES/DARE/subspace merges; multiple ops exist but none packaged as 2-op programmable calculus over a fixed pricking schedule.

Subspace-Boosting extracts dominant singular directions per task and recombines after Procrustes alignment — functionally a 'twist' (rotation) + 'cross' (subspace recombination) on a singular-direction graph; close to candidate's two-op view.
Activation-Guided Rotations apply a rotation (≈ twist) before merge (≈ cross of averaged components); two-stage pattern matches T-then-X composition.
Mediator: selective averaging per layer + routing; layer-wise but not a finite-alphabet T/X program over a static pricking.
